channel.title: Semantics on Marginalia
channel.description: Recent content in Semantics on Marginalia

item.title: The Semantics of "Analysis" in Mathematics (Newton → Present, Europe & the United States)
item.description: The Semantics of “Analysis” in Mathematics (Newton → Present, Europe & the United States)

item.title: What Is in a Book?
item.description: An essay arguing that books are fungible at the level of their verbal content, exploring how a book’s identity can be modeled via typed tuples and semantic constraint.
